hidden_state.wab_instruction: Set up as a new hire: add contacts from welcome emails, update your display density setting to 'compact', change default reply behavior to 'reply all', and reply to the team introduction email with your intro phrase. Do not use Reply All on the CC'd welcome email.

task_completion_criteria.intro_phrase: Thanks for the warm welcome! Looking forward to working with the team.
